---
title: "Spline Testing"
output: html_document
date: "2024-12-18"
---

Playing around with different spline configurations to see how they effect worm plots. Sticking to sex-stratified models in unharmonized global phenos (using study_site as fixed effect)

```{r warning=FALSE}
if(!require('pacman')) {
  install.packages('pacman')
}
pacman::p_load(data.table, ggplot2, tidyverse, stats, skimr, gamlss, gamlssTools)

source("code/gamlss_fit_funs.R")
```

load data
```{r}
df_full <- fread("data/csvs_by_pheno/global_vols.csv")
knot_list <- readRDS("code/knot_lists.RDS") #knots evenly spaced along log(age)
```

```{r}
gmv_df <- df_full %>%
  select(c(sexMale, logAge_days, age_days, study_site, GMV)) %>%
  na.omit()

test1 <- gamlss(formula=GMV ~ pb(logAge_days, k=10) + sexMale + study_site, sigma.formula = ~pb(logAge_days, k=10) + sexMale + study_site, family=GG, data=gmv_df)
```
